hero.title: Secure industrial operations with clear, risk-based decisions.
hero.subtitle: We translate fragmented technical findings into clear decisions for CISOs, COOs and plant managers — with deep OT expertise and Cyber Digital Twin capabilities.
hero.cta: Talk to an OT security expert

services.heading: OXOT services
services.intro: From first insight to sustainable management — a coherent path to make OT cyber risk manageable.

cta.title: Not sure where to start?
cta.body: Together we'll define the right first step for your organization.

items.name: OT Security Assessments
items.desc: Understand your current OT security posture, key risks and practical next steps.

items.name: Cyber Digital Twin
items.desc: Create a living model of your OT environment to support risk-based decisions at scale.

items.name: OT Security Programmes
items.desc: Design and execute structured OT security improvement programmes across sites, business units or regions.

items.name: Architecture & Segmentation
items.desc: Define secure OT network architectures, zones, conduits and practical segmentation patterns.

items.name: Secure Remote Access
items.desc: Reduce risk from vendor access, remote maintenance and external connectivity.

items.name: OT Security Baseline
items.desc: Define minimum security controls that are realistic, repeatable and aligned with operational needs.

items.name: Capability Transfer
items.desc: Help internal teams build the knowledge, structure and ownership needed to maintain OT security over time.

approach.heading: A clear path from insight to control.
approach.intro: One coherent journey — not a stack of disconnected reports. Each step builds on the last, so OT cyber risk becomes measurable, defensible and manageable.

steps.title: Assess
steps.body: See your real posture. We map assets, zones and risks against IEC 62443 and hand you a prioritized, practical starting point.

steps.title: Model
steps.body: Build a living Cyber Digital Twin of your OT, so decisions are based on the current reality of your environment — not last year’s spreadsheet.

steps.title: Improve
steps.body: Execute programmes that move the needle: architecture, segmentation, secure remote access and realistic security baselines across sites.

steps.title: Sustain
steps.body: Transfer ownership and capability, so your teams keep OT risk manageable long after the engagement ends.

twin.heading: One structured view of assets, risks and controls.
twin.body: Fragmented technical findings become a single, continuously-updated model of your operational technology — so CISOs, COOs and plant managers can make risk-based decisions with confidence.
points: A living model, continuously updated as your OT changes
Every risk scored and prioritized against IEC 62443
Board-ready reporting that turns detail into decisions

frameworksBand.eyebrow: Built on the standards that matter
frameworksBand.heading: We turn regulation into defensible security.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or may have moved. Let's get you back on track.

newsletterResult.confirmedBody: Thank you — your subscription is confirmed. You'll now receive OXOT compliance updates.
newsletterResult.unsubscribedBody: You have been unsubscribed from OXOT updates. Sorry to see you go.
newsletterResult.invalidBody: This link is invalid or has already been used.

agent.title: Ask OXOT
agent.greeting: Hi — ask me anything about this page.
agent.proactiveGreeting: Hi 👋 I'm the OXOT assistant. Ask me anything about the Cyber Resilience Act, NIS2, IEC 62443, or how OXOT can help.
agent.seedTemplate: I'm a {segment} — help me understand the CRA path that applies to us.

consent.title: Can we tailor this chat to your visit?
consent.body: We use first-party signals (pages viewed, clicks) only to make the assistant more helpful. Nothing is stored until you agree.

newsletter.heading: Newsletter
newsletter.helper: Compliance updates on the CRA, AI Act, Machinery Regulation & NIS2. Unsubscribe anytime.
newsletter.success: Thanks — you're on the list. Check your inbox to confirm.
newsletter.invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
newsletter.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

footer.disclaimer: OXOT turns overlapping EU regulations into a single, living evidence system — so your teams ship compliant products without drowning in paperwork.

social.heading: Follow Along
social.subtitle: Get the latest updates directly from our social channels.
social.linkedinBlurb: Stay updated with our latest compliance insights and announcements.

cookies.title: Your privacy choices
cookies.body: We use essential cookies to make this site work. With your consent we also use analytics cookies to understand how the site is used — you decide.

contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your OT environment, sites, and what you're trying to achieve.
contact.success: Thanks — your message reached us. An OXOT expert will be in touch shortly.
contact.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again, or email us directly.
contact.errorRate: Too many messages from this connection. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
contact.errEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
contact.errMessage: Please add a few sentences so we can help.

conformity.title: OT conformity, mapped across every regulation
conformity.subtitle: One model that connects EU regulations, cross-cutting themes and the concrete obligations they place on operational technology.

overview.byRegulationHint: Bar width is relative to the regulation with the most mapped requirements.
overview.keyDatesHint: Implementation milestones across the regulations we track.
overview.coverageHint: How many of the cross-cutting themes each regulation touches.

regulations.intro: The regulations and standards that shape OT conformity in the EU.

themes.intro: Cross-cutting themes that recur across the regulations — the connective tissue of the matrix.

matrix.intro: Themes down the side, regulations across the top. Each cell counts the requirements mapped there.
matrix.legend: Colour intensity shows how many requirements are mapped for each theme and regulation. Select a filled cell to see them.
matrix.empty: Select a filled cell to see the mapped requirements.

sources.intro: These are the source documents behind the mappings — the research, references and worked examples the obligations are drawn from.

meta.title: Four regulations. One evidence system.
meta.description: OXOT unifies the Cyber Resilience Act, the AI Act, the Machinery Regulation and IEC 62443 into a single, living source of conformity evidence — so your teams prove compliance instead of chasing it.

hero.title: Four regulations. One evidence system.
hero.subtitle: OXOT unifies the Cyber Resilience Act, the AI Act, the Machinery Regulation and IEC 62443 into a single, living source of conformity evidence — so your teams prove compliance instead of chasing it.

slides.title: Secure industrial operations with clear, risk-based decisions
slides.body: Beyond the platform, OXOT's OT-security consultants turn regulation into defensible security for your plants and products.

slides.title: One structured view of assets, risks and controls
slides.body: A single, continuously-updated model of your OT — so every risk-based decision rests on the current reality of your environment.

slides.title: We turn regulation into defensible security
slides.body: Our consultants translate overlapping regulation into controls your engineers and auditors can actually stand behind.

regBand.label: Built for the regulations reshaping industrial products

items.label: regulations mapped to one control set
less duplicate work across overlapping requirements
not quarters to an audit-ready dossier
traceable, every claim linked to evidence

platform.heading: Everything a conformity dossier needs, in one place
platform.intro: Stop maintaining four parallel spreadsheets. OXOT models the shared reality underneath every regulation and keeps it current as your product evolves.

cards.title: Unified control library
cards.body: One requirement model spanning CRA, AI Act, Machinery and IEC 62443 — mapped, deduplicated and versioned.

cards.title: Living evidence
cards.body: Link tickets, tests, SBOMs and design docs to controls. Evidence updates as your product does.

cards.title: Gap detection
cards.body: See exactly which obligations are covered, partial or open — per product, per regulation, in real time.

cards.title: Audit-ready export
cards.body: Generate a structured technical file and declaration of conformity your notified body can actually follow.

cards.title: Risk & threat modeling
cards.body: Structured risk assessments aligned to IEC 62443 and the AI Act, reusable across product lines.

cards.title: Expert in the loop
cards.body: OXOT consultants review your dossier and coach your team — the platform never leaves you alone with the hard calls.

problem.heading: The regulations overlap. Your tooling doesn't.
problem.body: CRA wants secure-by-design evidence. IEC 62443 wants the same, in its own language. The Machinery Regulation adds safety. The AI Act adds risk management. Most teams answer each one separately — and pay for the same work four times.
items: Evidence that goes stale the moment code ships
No single view of what is actually covered

shift.heading: Prove conformity as a by-product of building
shift.body: OXOT maps every obligation to a shared control once, then wires those controls to the evidence your teams already produce. Compliance stops being a project and becomes a property of how you work.
items: Engineers contribute evidence without leaving their tools
Leadership sees conformity status at a glance

howItWorks.heading: From scattered documents to a living dossier

steps.title: Scope
steps.body: We map your products to the regulations that apply and the controls they share.

steps.title: Connect
steps.body: Evidence sources — tests, SBOMs, risk assessments — are wired into the control model.

steps.title: Close gaps
steps.body: OXOT surfaces what's open; our experts help you close it efficiently.

testimonial.quote: We used to treat every regulation as a separate fire drill. With OXOT the evidence writes itself once and answers all of them.
testimonial.author: Head of Product Security

items.a: CRA, the EU AI Act, the Machinery Regulation and IEC 62443 today, with NIS2 and the Radio Equipment Directive mapped alongside them.
Both — a living evidence platform, backed by OXOT's OT-security consultants for the judgment calls.

items.q: Do our engineers have to learn a new tool?
items.a: No — evidence is linked from the tools they already use; the platform pulls it together.

items.q: How quickly can we be audit-ready?
items.a: Weeks, not quarters — once your evidence sources are wired in, the dossier stays current automatically.

cta.heading: See your conformity status in one view

meta.title: The Cyber Resilience Act. Get ready. Get in line.
meta.description: OXOT classifies your products, builds defensible technical files on IEC 62443, and holds reserved assessment slots with our Conformity Body partners. Book a free 45-minute intake.

intakeForm.leaveWith: You leave the call with your likely classification, your road to the CE mark, and a level-of-effort estimate.
